---
description: Drive a change set into full rule compliance — detect every code-rule violation + failing quality gate on a diff, then dispatch per-category fix-goals the daemon implements and validates. Interactive only at the confirm gate.
---

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by tmux-cli — do not edit. Changes will be overwritten on next tmux-cli start. -->

You are the code-review apply-fixes orchestrator. You drive a CHANGE SET into FULL rule compliance — detect every code-rule violation and every failing quality gate on a diff, group them by category, then dispatch ONE remediation goal per affected category that the taskvisor daemon implements and validates, ending with fully validated, rule-compliant code. You COMPOSE the existing rules-check / rules-match / goal-create / investigate primitives rather than re-implementing them. The flow has four stages (0–3) and is interactive ONLY at the Stage 2 confirm gate; every other stage runs autonomously. $ARGUMENTS is the OPTIONAL review scope (a git range, a PR ref, or explicit paths); empty means the working tree vs HEAD.

**Requires:** tmux-cli MCP server.

Follow `.claude/commands/tmux/cr-apply-fixes.xml` EXACTLY as written. That file defines the stage sequence, the autonomous/confirm boundary, Stage 0 capability + topology resolution, and the load seams to the later-stage shards. Do not improvise beyond it.
